front: Short Story: protagonist walks with a man whose staff resembles a serpent; finds wife Faith and Goody Cloyse at a witches' sabbath; 'no hopeful verse' on his tombstone
Short Story: wife's pink ribbon falls from the sky as protagonist rushes through forest to satanic ceremony
Novel: Judge Jaffrey Pyncheon chokes on blood in oaken chair; Hepzibah opens shop for brother Clifford; Holgrave hypnotizes Phoebe
back: The House of the Seven Gables (Nathaniel Hawthorne)
work: The House of the Seven Gables

front: Short Story: Beatrice made poisonous by her botanist father's garden in Padua; Professor Baglioni's antidote kills her
Short Story: scientist Aylmer creates elixir to remove a hand-shaped crimson birthmark from wife Georgiana, killing her
Short Story: Robin sees relative tarred and feathered by a mob led by a man with face painted half red and half black
Short Story: man searches for the Unpardonable Sin for eighteen years; throws himself into a lime kiln upon finding it in his own heart
Short Story: Mother Rigby creates a living scarecrow that woos Polly Gookin but falls apart after looking in a mirror
Author: added a 'w' to his family name to distance himself from Salem witch trial judge ancestor John Hathorne
